title: Reservation Manager Vacancy at Barbeque Nation Digital Technologies - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Reservation Manager Vacancy at Barbeque Nation Digital Technologies - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
Barbeque Nation Digital Technologies is actively seeking a talented and motivated Reservation Manager to join our dynamic team in Chennai. This is an excellent opportunity for professionals who are passionate about making a real impact in a fast-growing organization.

About Barbeque Nation Digital Technologies:
Barbeque Nation Digital Technologies is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Conduct regular guest satisfaction surveys and implement improvements
• Ensure compliance with FSSAI, health, and safety regulations
• Plan and execute banquets, events, and MICE functions
• Manage procurement of hotel supplies and control operating costs
• Deliver exceptional guest experiences in line with brand standards
• Manage front office operations including check-in/check-out
• Train and supervise front-line staff on service standards

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Any graduate with relevant experience
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Sommelier Skills
• Proficiency in F&B Service
• Proficiency in Travel Management
• Proficiency in Revenue Management
• Proficiency in GDS Systems
• Proficiency in MICE
• Proficiency in PMS Systems
• Proficiency in Front Office

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Learning & development budget
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Annual performance appraisal
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Chennai, Tamil Nadu, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Barbeque Nation Digital Technologies!
